factors.data_availability: medium — CLL tissue exists but PBMC pool is thin (13 specimens); bone marrow biopsy is structurally rare in commercial biobanks
factors.org_discoverability: medium — 10 orgs in AminoChain but IGHV tracking requires clinical depth most commercial orgs lack
factors.biomarker_specificity: high — IGHV mutation status not tracked in any biospecimen registry; treatment-naive CLL structurally absent from commercial biobanks

expected_failure_modes: IGHV mutation status not tracked in any biospecimen registry — pipeline must flag as not_stated, never infer from diagnosis
CLL PBMC cryopreservation requires specialized protocols (density gradient, DMSO, controlled-rate freezing) — viability claims without protocol citation are hallucinations
Bone marrow biopsy tissue is a clinical diagnostic procedure — very rare in commercial biobanks; only 115 tissue specimens across all 10 orgs
Pipeline likely surfaces 100K Genomes Project CLL cohort and Danish CLL study — these are data-access only, physical specimen re-access is a separate gate that pipeline must distinguish
Treatment-naive CLL is enrolled in trials (CLL8, CLL11, RESONATE) not biobanks — pipeline may find these as data cohorts but must not conflate data access with specimen procurement
